notes: Core loop exists but ghost pathfinding is broken (ghosts get stuck/clip through walls), movement feels jittery, maze rendering uses filled squares instead of proper wall outlines making it look blocky, and there's an undefined PACMAN_SPEED_LEVEL variable used incorrectly in nextLevel().
A critical logic error in the movement code causes Pac-Man to get permanently stuck as soon as he enters a tile adjacent to a wall, making the game completely unplayable.
Core Pac-Man loop is present, but ghost-house/gate logic is incomplete, level speed scaling is effectively broken, visuals are simplified, and gameplay is only moderately authentic.
